name: Manicotti Florentine for the Microwave
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2-quart covered casserole, combine the ground beef and chopped onion. Cook, stirring occasionally and breaking up the meat until all redness is gone, about 5-7 minutes.
2. Drain excess fat from the cooked meat.
3. Add the thawed spinach to the casserole and stir to incorporate.
4. Mix the remaining ingredients (bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, eggs, salt, and pepper) in a bowl.
5. Stuff the manicotti with the meat mixture evenly.
6. Place the manicotti in a single layer in a 2-quart rectangular casserole dish.
7. Pour the sauce over the manicotti.
8. Cover loosely with waxed paper and cook for 10 minutes in the microwave oven on high power.
9. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
10. Sprinkle additional Parmesan cheese on top, if desired.
Sauce Instructions:
1. In a 2-quart casserole, combine all sauce ingredients.
2. Cook, covered, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes in the microwave oven.
